---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ["R4CK"]
---

## Problem
<!-- What's the situation that this feature would address? Don't jump to a solution yet. -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- Your suggested approach. Be specific. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Other ways this could be solved. Why is your proposal better? -->

## Scope check
- [ ] This stays within the plugin's purpose (model routing for Claude Code)
- [ ] No new external dependencies (the plugin is intentionally zero-dep)
- [ ] Backward compatible — existing user `task-routing.json` configs still work
- [ ] Could be opt-in (disabled by default) if it changes any behavior

## Use case
<!-- Real-world scenario where this would help. The more concrete, the better. -->

## Example
<!-- If applicable: example prompts, before/after, mock UI, sample config -->

## Willing to contribute?
- [ ] I'd open a PR for this
- [ ] I'd help test it
- [ ] Discussion only — would prefer someone else implements

## Additional context
<!-- Screenshots, links to similar features in other tools, related issues -->
